home.hero_description: Founded by coach, promoter and professional wrestler Dru Onyx, Torture Chamber Pro Wrestling Dojo delivers a complete journey - from fundamentals to televised performance. Our top grads tour globally and work across radio, TV and film. Since 2004, we have been recruiting the next wave of professional wrestlers. Join the team, live your dream.
home.ring_p1: We welcome students of ALL levels.
home.ring_p2: Qualified instructors in a safe learning environment.
home.ring_p3: Whether you want to go PRO, get in shape or just experience the thrill of pro wrestling training, we've got a program for you.
home.why_p1: Emphasis on the fundamentals of professional wrestling, all fitness levels welcome.
home.testimonials_subtitle: Hear from our students - from beginners to professionals, everyone has a story.
home.feature_training_desc: Learn from experienced pros who have competed at the highest levels of professional wrestling.
home.feature_results_desc: Our graduates have gone on to compete in major promotions worldwide since 2004.
home.feature_schedule_desc: Multiple class times throughout the week to fit your training into your busy life.
home.cta_subtitle: Join the next generation of professional wrestlers. Your journey starts here.

training.curriculum_p1: Safe break falls, footwork, lockups, holds, submissions, take downs, and body throws. Basic training, cardio and core strength, stretches and practice routines.
training.curriculum_p2: Match structure, timing and positioning, ring psychology, tag dynamics, high spots, chain wrestling and reversals and finishes.
training.curriculum_p3: Mic skills, character development, media training for interviews TV/social. Working a televised match, Industry tryouts, bookings, touring prep and agent showcases through our network.
training.how_p1: Send a message to our team, they will reach out to answer your questions and discuss your goals.
training.how_p2: All levels are welcome, everyone starts somewhere!
